# Daily Report — 2026-07-01

## Task Completed
Added three problem task management tools: `create_problem_task`, `list_problem_tasks`, and `close_problem_task`. The new `problem_task_tools.py` targets the ServiceNow `problem_task` table and links tasks to parent problems via the `problem` field. Each tool accepts a problem/task number (e.g. PRB0001234 / PTASK0010001) or a 32-char sys_id with automatic lookup resolution. `close_problem_task` sets state=3 (Closed Complete) with optional close_notes and work_notes. All three tools are registered in the service_desk and full packages.

- Total tests: 1,962

- All passing: yes
